reviews.comment:
Buena atención,  baños limpios, los beneficios para el socio, que no vive en  CABA, son pocos; por tal razón solicité la baja

(Translated by Google)
Good service, clean bathrooms, but the benefits for members who don't live in Buenos Aires are few; for that reason, I requested to cancel my membership.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para hacer un stop en la ruta y disfrutar de una buena comida o un descanso

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop along the way and enjoy a good meal or a rest
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2swelExVTViM1E1VTNJM2VtOVJNREJMVWpsMWRGRRAB

reviews.comment:
El resto excelente. Pero la atención en surtidores es u a catástrofe. 20 minutos esperando con 2 autos adelante. No hacen algo básico como empezar a cargarte nafta y ganar tiempo mientras le cobran a otro

(Translated by Google)
Everything else was excellent. But the service at the pumps is a disaster. I waited 20 minutes with two cars ahead of me. They don't do something as basic as start pumping gas and give someone else time while they fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xFM1owZFNXVEZDVkhWSFdXVkdhR3Q0V1hoRFkyYxAB

Muy bueno. Se destaca el lugar para tomar cafe y restaurant de ACA. En la estación la atención es amable
